name: Mou Sou Pork B1
recipeIngredient: 5 -Tree ears or up to 10 Tree ears, soaked in lukewarm water for 20 minutes, then drained and left whole
1/4 cup Tiger lily buds, soaked in lukewarm water for 20 minutes, then drained and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Chinese pancakes.
2. Marinate pork with cornstarch, salt, pepper, sherry, and enough beaten egg to moisten for 30 minutes.
3. Heat wok until hot and dry. Add oil. When the oil begins to smoke, add pork and slightly beaten eggs, stirring so pieces separate.
4. Once the eggs form themselves into curds, drain through a colander, reserving about 2-3 tbsp of oil. Return the reserved oil to the wok and lightly brown the garlic.
5. Add all vegetables and stir-fry or flip until just cooked, about 3-4 minutes.
6. Return meat and eggs to the vegetables in the wok. Stir in 2 tsp hoisin sauce, soy sauce, sherry, sugar, salt, pepper, and MSG. Combine well.
7. Remove from heat. Spread each Chinese pancake with hoisin sauce. Add a generous amount of filling to the bottom half of each pancake and roll up like crepes.
8. Serve.
